subcodes.first_line: O ye divine friends! Though outwardly far and remote, in reality ye are present in this assembly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی هر چند که بحسب ظاهر دور و مهجورید ولی در حقیقت حاضر انجمنید و
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
